nws_periods.name: This Afternoon
nws_periods.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms. Some of the storms could be severe. Partly sunny, with a high near 83. South wind 10 to 15 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

nws_periods.name: Tonight
nws_periods.shortForecast: Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Partly Cloudy
nws_periods.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 7pm, then showers and thunderstorms likely between 7pm and 10pm. Some of the storms could be severe. Partly cloudy, with a low around 62. East wind 5 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%.
